name: project-scoping
description: Sayer pre-sale scoping toolkit — client intake (Fireflies/Gmail/HubSpot, Notion mirror), workstream-based hour estimates, risk registers, brand-styled Excel scope packages, CSA/SOW contract drafting, and bundled Sayer brand guidelines. Run from a clone of the project-scoping-tool repo; skills read shared calibration and templates from the repo working directory.
